key_themes: Strategic Avadel acquisition expanding into sleep medicine with LUMRYZ
Orexin pipeline momentum with FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation, positive Phase 2 data, and Phase 3 initiation for alixorexton
Proprietary product growth (LYBALVI/ARISTADA) and strong 2026 revenue/adj. EBITDA guidance despite Q4 EPS miss and GAAP loss outlook
sources_checked: Yahoo Finance earnings highlights & stock reaction
X posts on recent pipeline updates
summary: Alkermes reported ~9% YoY growth in proprietary product net sales to $1.18B in 2025 (driven by strong LYBALVI uptake), generated solid profitability and ended with $1.3B in cash, while completing the Avadel acquisition to add commercial LUMRYZ and accelerate its sleep disorder franchise.[[1]](https://investor.alkermes.com/news-releases/news-release-details/alkermes-plc-reports-financial-results-fourth-quarter-and-year-5/)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/alkermes-plc-alks-q4-2025-190301956.html)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/alkermes-plc-alks-q4-2025-190301956.html) The company issued upbeat 2026 guidance for total revenue of $1.73–1.84B and adjusted EBITDA of $370–410M, backed by continued pipeline progress including FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation and ongoing Phase 3 development for alixorexton in narcolepsy plus additional positive Phase 2 data presentations in April 2026.[[3]](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/alkermes-alks-6-6-fda-021100075.html) Analysts largely maintain Buy/Outperform ratings with average price targets of ~$42–44 (25–30% upside from recent ~$34–36 levels), though Q4 EPS missed estimates, 2025 revenue was slightly down YoY, and 2026 GAAP guidance shows a net loss from heavy R&D investment and acquisition costs.[[4]](https://www.chartmill.com/stock/quote/ALKS/analyst-ratings)[[5]](https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/NASDAQ/ALKS/forecast/) Biggest risk is clinical/regulatory execution on the orexin program and realizing expected synergies from the Avadel deal amid competition and increased leverage/expenses.

recent_posts.highlight: Announced presentation of additional P2 narcolepsy results for alixorexton on April 20, 2026 at AAN
Highlighted additional positive data on alixorexton in daily biotech catalyst recap
Phase 3 Brilliance program initiated for alixorexton in narcolepsy type 1 & 2, assessing wakefulness and patient outcomes
Reposted company announcement on Vibrance-1 Phase 2 additional data presentation at AAN 2026
